titleStmt.title: SII 16.211: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 211. (A.R. No. 452 of 1923.) KŪḌḶŪRU, RAYADRUG TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Hanumān temple.
This is dated Śaka 147[8], Naḷa, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, corresponding to 1556 A.D., May 24, Sunday, (lunar eclipse).

The inscription records the grant of Kūḍḷūru alias Reḍḍirājapuram comprising of the villages Kāṭepalle and Muddalāpuram situated in Rāyadurgam-sīma by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju-Viṭṭhalarāja-Tirumalayyadēva-Mahārāju for the merit of Viṭṭhalarājayya. The grant was made actually a month earlier in Vaiśākha as indicated in the text. Rāyadurgam-sīma in which the grant village lay was obtained by the donor as his nāyaṅkara territory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmacaṁdrāya namaḥ . śubhamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē .
trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1478 Agunēṭi naḷa saṁvatsara jyēṣṭa śu 15 lu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivamahārāyalu vidyāna
garamaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhvisāṁbrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānū śrī
manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju viṭhalarāju tirumalayyadēva mahārājulugā
ru śrīmadyajanādiṣaṭkarmaniratulaina rāyadurggaṁśīmaku celēṭi kūḍlūriki pra
tināmamaina kāṭepalle muddalāpuraṁ saṁggatamaina reḍḍirājapuramanēṭi sarvamā
nyapu Agrahāraṁ Aśēṣavidvanmahājanālakunnu daṁḍaṁ peṭi yicina dharmaśilāśā
sanakramameṭlannanu sadāśivamahārāyalu māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina rāyadurgaṁ śī
maku cellēṭi kūḍlūriki pratināmamaina kāṭepalle muddalāpura saṁggatamaina
reḍḍirājapuraṁ Agrahārāna Agrahāraṁ Aṁdu
prayōjana rokhaṁ mīku mōda
Aṁdu mīku va ku Accē
śēśē [Aṁduku]
yivi mōdalaina kha
valla vaccē Aparādhaṁ
yivi mōdalaina
viṭhalarājayyaṁgāriki puṇyaṁgānu vaiśākha śu 15 mi puṇyakālamaṁ
du dhāravōsi yiccina sarvamānya dharmaśilāśāsanaṁ yī dharmānaku yavvaru dappinānu
tama mātāpitṛlanu kāśilōnu vadhiṁcina pāpāna bōvuvāru gōbrāṁhmalunu
vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōvuvāru Ani yiccina dharma śilāśāsanaṁ . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarrvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā vipra
dattā vasuṁdharā . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
